PowerShell($procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'backend' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'dist.main' }; $procs | ForEach-Object { "stopping PID $\($_.ProcessId\): $\($_.CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(90, $_.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if \(-not $procs\) { "no backend node processes found" })

PowerShell($stray = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'next' -and $_.ProcessId -notin 7312, 11048 }; $stray | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "stopped stray next process PID $\($_.ProcessId\)" }; if \(-not $stray\) { "no stray next build processes" })

PowerShell($next = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'next' }; $next | ForEach-Object { $cpu = \(Get-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CPU; "PID $\($_.ProcessId\) started $\($_.CreationDate.ToString\('HH:mm:ss'\)\) cpu=$\([math]::Round\($cpu,1\)\)s :: $\($_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(95,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)\)" })
